title: reholttumia novae-caledoniae
intro: Reholttumia novae-caledoniae, also known as the New Caledonian Reholttumia, is a flowering plant species native to the Pacific island of New Caledonia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Reholttumia novae-caledoniae include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and prevent infections, which can help to accelerate the healing process. Herbal preparations of Reholttumia novae-caledoniae are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in water or using it as a tincture to extract its medicinal compounds.
